LanguageData.HD2_Pelican_Vehicle.label: Pelican
LanguageData.HD2_Pelican_Vehicle.description:
Pelican shuttles are tiltwing single-stage-to-orbit (SSTO) transport craft. Pelicans are restricted to vertical take-off and landing only due to the design of their landing gear. Each shuttle can transport up to four passengers at a time.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Pilot x1, Passenger x4
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel:</color> Chemfuel
